title: Gate colored-shape invention on open background
oneline: Detector works; 11 shipped night fills carry confirmed invented shapes
summary: Built an offline flood-fill + median-background-color + connected-blob detector that flags floating foreign blobs on the open background. Sweeping all 188 committed raws confirmed the gap is real: 11 of 94 night fills shipped with invented shapes (sparkles, extra road dashes, a smoke puff, rings, glow orbs, pebbles) — mostly PALE blobs, the exact thick-white class scoreDrift's opening exempts. A synthesized planet+star injection flags (2 blobs) while the unmodified page stays clean. Anchor-fraction (line/border contact < 5%) plus a 60-8000 px area window yields ~0 false positives across the catalog.
tried: Flood open bg from border via scoreNightness machinery, mask dilated source ink, median bg color, flag deviant blobs (DEV_T=60 RGB)
Full sweep of all 188 committed raws (94 light + 94 night) with visual confirmation of every flag against source line art
Synthesized positive: auto-locate deep-open-bg spots, inject saturated planet (r=36) + star (r=16) into clean space/ship-tall.night
Three anchoring variants: line-only, absolute border-px wash rule, combined line+border fraction (winner)
worked: Detector catches both synthesized blobs (areas 1221, 84) while unmodified page flags 0
Catalog sweep found 23 confirmed invented blobs on 11 shipped night pages incl. two of the idea's three try-on pages (trex-wide smoke puff, police-wide extra road dashes)
Anchor-fraction rule (<5% line+border contact) suppresses all false-positive classes: source-drawn moons/stars, line glow, corner vignettes, ground washes, edge-open legit regions
MAX_BLOB=8000 cleanly splits compact inventions (<=1283 px) from painted ground washes (>=21668 px), reported as info
failed: Absolute border-contact wash rule: un-flagged the real police-wide road dash (touches frame bottom) — relative anchoring required
Saturation/chroma alone as the signal: most real shipped inventions are PALE (smoke, dashes, rings), not saturated
limitations: Misses inventions hugging a source line or page edge (>5% contact) or colored within DEV_T~60 of the bg median
Enclosed source regions never audited; edge-open source regions enter the bg mask (handled by anchoring, not prevented)
Faint glow wisps (rover-tall) sit near the boundary — as a generation gate prefer keep-best-of-N on flagged area over hard reject
Thresholds calibrated on this catalog + gemini-2.5-flash-image; re-sweep after any model change

comparisons.label: Synthesized positive: clean page vs injected planet+star with detection
comparisons.note: Unmodified space/ship-tall.night flags 0; injected copy flags exactly the 2 pasted shapes (red boxes; amber = pixels deviating from bg median)
